zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Fleming於1556年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯斯藍時，她的父親Thomas Fleming27歲，母親Catherine Preston23歲。她於1573年2月21日與Pierce Butler在英國艾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1597年12月9日享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Fleming于1556年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯斯藍时，她的父亲Thomas Fleming27岁，母亲Catherine Preston23岁。她于1573年2月21日与Pierce Butler在英国艾可迪德哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1597年12月9日享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fleming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Flemings
meanings: Americanized form of Flemish Vleminckx: patronymic from Vleminck, an ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle Dutch vleminc.

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Flemming
meanings: German: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle High German vlaeminc. People from Flanders spread throughout Germany, as well as England, in the Middle Ages as clothmakers and dyers.

variants.name: Flamenco
meanings: Spanish: ethnic name from flamenco ‘Fleming, Flemish person’ (see Fleming ).

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Fleming was born in 1556, in Slane, County Meath, Ireland, her father, Thomas Fleming, was 27 and her mother, Catherine Preston, was 23. She married Pierce Butler on 21 February 1573, in Dedham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 9 December 1597, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Fleming est née en 1556, à Slane, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Thomas Fleming, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Catherine Preston, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Pierce Butler le 21 février 1573, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 décembre 1597, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Fleming 1556 in Slane, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Fleming 27 und ihre Mutter Catherine Preston 23. Sie hat am 21. Februar 1573 in Dedham, Essex, England Pierce Butler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Dezember 1597 im Alter von 41 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Fleming è nata il nel 1556 nel Slane, County Meath, Irlanda, sua padre, Thomas Fleming, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Catherine Preston, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Pierce Butler il 21 febbraio 1573, nel Dedham, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 dicembre 1597, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Flemingが1556年にアイルランドコウントイ メアススランで生まれた時，父Thomas Flemingは27歳，母Catherine Prestonは23歳であった。1573年2月21日にイギリスエセックスデドハムでPierce Butlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1597年12月9日に41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Fleming(이)가 1556년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 슬랜에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Fleming(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Preston(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1573년 2월 21일 영국 에세스 데드함에서 Pierce Butler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1597년 12월 9일 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Fleming nasceu em 1556, em Slane, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Thomas Fleming, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Preston, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Pierce Butler em 21 de fevereiro de 1573, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de dezembro de 1597, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Fleming родилась в 1556 г. в местности слан, коунти мит, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Thomas Fleming было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Preston, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Pierce Butler 21 февраля 1573 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 декабря 1597 г. в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Fleming nació en 1556, en Slane, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Thomas Fleming, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Catherine Preston, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Pierce Butler el 21 de febrero de 1573, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de diciembre de 1597, a la edad de 41 años.
